insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and completing your first session will not only give you a sense of accomplishment, but also provide a foundation to build upon and start tracking your progress. By focusing on making incremental progress, one session at a time, you can establish a routine, develop a growth mindset, and eventually see improvements in your scores and streak, setting yourself up for long-term success.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
